requires_new_decision_after_confirmation.rationale: PRE contract keeps lifecycle state outside digest-bound actionability and avoids blind preservation.

invalidation_rules: clear if proposed_external_target becomes None or empty
clear if confirmation is no longer required
clear if finalizer or scrubber removes external companion artifacts
clear if decision normalizes to local/no-external fallback
invalidate and recompute if digest_purpose or digest_version changes

writer_boundary: future external-confirmation finalizer/helper may compute digest when a decision is in a confirmation-bearing external-proposal state
future scrubber/fallback normalizer must clear digest when the decision is targetless or local/no-external
reader_boundary: future confirmation validator may compare stored digest against recomputed digest before accepting a confirmation payload
non_reader_boundary: router selection must not treat digest as permission
provider execution path must not treat digest as permission
network execution path must not treat digest as permission
E3 budget gate must not treat digest as permission
